nodes.goal: Load OSM Chicago Loop + Near South Side layers and accumulated shadow CSV measurements.
GPU compute of per-road shadow minutes and contribution % using a building footprint and height.
Show roads colored by shadow contribution percentage; pick buildings to drive the histogram.
Histogram of road shadow hours, brushable to highlight matching road segments on the map.

dataflow.name: Chicago Shadows
dataflow.task: Load OSM Chicago Loop and a CSV of accumulated shadow measurements, GPU-compute per-road shadow contribution from a building, and link a histogram brush to map highlights.
